nasb.text: “Make him drunk, for he has become arrogant toward the Lord; so Moab will wallow in his vomit, and he also will become a laughingstock.

esv.text: “Make him drunk, because he magnified himself against the Lord, so that Moab shall wallow in his vomit, and he too shall be held in derision.

cnv.text: 你們要使摩押沉醉，因為它向耶和華妄自尊大；摩押必跌在自己所吐之物上面，也必成為被人譏笑的對象。

ccb.text: “你们要灌醉她，因为她藐视耶和华。她必在自己的呕吐物中打滚，被人耻笑。
